creator: jszhao@yeah.net
text:
when update the ports installed using portupgrade, i got:

** Port marked as IGNORE: x11-wm/stumpwm:
        is marked as broken: require needs a pathname for uninstalled modules with the ASDF 3.x bundled with sbcl

I hope to know, is there a proper way to upgrade x11-wm/stumpwm. In fact, I can't understand the error message. Therefore, I cannot find a way to deal with it.

Any hints?

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11-wm/stumpwd
make install clean
